roa.docketEntryComment: DA REQUEST ADD TO CALENDAR TO RECALL BW & DISMISS PER PC 1381 FILED
DEF ATC MOT TO RECALL BW, FILED

/CAL:PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION PURSUANT TO PC 3455/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE) AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/PD/CTORD: PRCS IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/ACM/WIAPRCS/ /S9 /TBH: 21008071/CONTD: TO TRAIL 21008072   /
/CAL: DEFENDANT MOTION TO RECALL BW/X: OFF CALENDAR, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT/
/CAL: APD 3455PC/FTA/BWI/NB/X:POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION IS REVOKED,/BWNUM:1ST/X: 1 OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE /NIGHTSERV/
/CAL:APD 3455PC MOTION/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 9/TRANS 9:FORTHWITH FOR AN ON APD 3455PC MOTION & TO JOIN #21008072/
